desc: Opens the COBie Sheet Manager — a WebView2 + AI Chat split-panel for viewing and editing COBie data across all 20 COBie v2.4 sheets with compliance tracking.
summary: Opens the COBie Sheet Manager — a WebView2 + AI Chat split-panel for viewing and editing COBie data across all 20 COBie v2.4 sheets with compliance tracking.
usecase: User wants to view or edit COBie facility management data for handover. User wants to check COBie compliance against BEP or BS 1192-4. User wants to export COBie .xlsx spreadsheet. User wants to populate COBie parameters from the Revit model.
notfor: Editing Revit schedules directly (use Parameter Editor). Creating shared parameters (use Shared Parameters setup).
postcondition: A singleton modeless CobieSheetWindow is shown. If already open, it is brought to front.

successprompts: COBie Sheet Manager is now open.
failureprompts: Failed to open COBie Sheet Manager: {error}
